creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #64)

Well, Michael, it's not that I'm against putting those patches to upstream... Over 20+ years I'm periodically trying to do so and sometimes even succeed.

But overall process for each patch takes a lot of time and effort, so eventually I give up...

If you feel force(tm) to chase Samba team I'm all to introduce you to the patches and what they do and can help you with brushing them, if any.

But I'm quite skeptical about the results :(
